title: O.R.C
description: You have 20 minutes. The clock starts tickin' when you begin.

elements.name: intro
elements.html:
BRIEFING

You have infiltrated a bank's internal network and gained a foothold on a vulnerable workstation. Your objective: reach a high-privilege account and initiate an unauthorized transfer.


You have 20 minutes. Every action costs time. Switching paths will cost extra time, you are free to do so at any point during this process. Choose wisely!

elements.name: recon_tool
elements.title: You're on the internal network. You need to enumerate the environment. Which tool do you use for initial recon?

choices.text: Nmap — Run a full port scan across the subnet [costs 3 min]
Netdiscover — Passive ARP scan to find live hosts [costs 1 min]
Wireshark — Capture live traffic and analyze passively [costs 4 min]
Manual enumeration — Check local ARP table and routing [costs 2 min]

elements.name: recon_target
elements.title: Your scan reveals several hosts. Which do you prioritize?

choices.text: 192.168.1.17 — Port 22 open (SSH), banner shows Ubuntu 18.04 [costs 1 min]
192.168.1.55 — Port 80/443 open, internal web portal [costs 1 min]

elements.name: chosen_path
elements.title: Based on your recon, which attack vector do you pursue?

choices.text: Path A — SQL Injection via the internal web portal [costs 2 min]
Path B — OS Command Injection via the web app's diagnostic endpoint [costs 2 min]
Path C — Stored XSS through the internal forum [costs 2 min]
Path D — CSRF/request forgery against the transfer portal [costs 2 min]
